name: generative-ui
description: > Design system and guidelines for Claude's built-in generative UI — the show_widget tool that renders interactive HTML/SVG widgets inline in claude.ai conversations. This skill provides the complete Anthropic "Imagine" design system so Claude produces high-quality widgets without needing to call read_me first. Use this skill whenever the user asks to visualize data, create an interactive chart, build a dashboard, render a diagram, draw a flowchart, show a mockup, create an interactive explainer
author: himself65
summary_zh: 这是一套指导 Claude 生成交互界面的设计规范，能让你在对话中直接获取高质量的数据图表、流程图或仪表盘，省去每次都要教它如何排版画图的麻烦。
